revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=End%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} == Usage == This template ends any table (with bar-brace "|}") and may be used with any other templates that begin a one-level table, except with template {{tl|Collapse top}} which requires a {{tl|collapse bottom}} to end a collapsible text. ''Note'': Using the standard table end wikitext {{code||}}} will work correctly, but may be seen as an error by some maintenance utilities. This template duplicates {{tl|s-end}} for technical reasons. See the documentation on that page. Any succession template ending with {{tl|end}} should be changed to {{tl|s-end}}. === Position === WARNING: Template {{tl|end}} must be placed on a separate line for ending a table; otherwise, it inserts a literal bar-brace "|}" into the text. == Redirects == Other "table end" templates redirect to this one. Where possible, use the end template that matches the start template. For example ending {{Tlx|Election box}} series with {{TLx|Election box end}}. If no specific end template exists, then a hidden comment can be added, such as {{End}} , to indicate which start template it matches. == Example == {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ''Result:'' {{election table|title=Summary of the May 2, 2011 election}} |- style="text-align:right;" ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:400; text-align:left;" colspan="2" | Party ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:200; text-align:left;" | Main candidate ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Votes ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | % ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | Seats ! style="background-color:#E9E9E9; width:50;" | +/– |- | style="background-color:green" | || Green | John Johnson | 12 | 50% | +5 | 5 | +1 |- {{end}} ==Tracking categories== *{{clc|Pages using end template with unknown parameters}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Ends a table. Must appear on a separate line. Normally used with {{col-begin}}. It takes no parameters.", "params": { } } == See also == * {{tl|!)}} *{{tl|Rugby squad end}} inserts two instances of wikitable closing markup *{{tl|Div col end}} inserts a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag *{{tl|End tab}} inserts two closing {{tag|div|c}} tags *{{tl|Pope list end}} inserts a wikitext {{!}}} closing tag followed by a closing {{tag|div|c}} tag * {{tl|Column-generating template families}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Succession templates]] [[Category:Templates with partial table wikitext]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
